description: Raw materials creates a dependency affecting Supplier selection, especially around material source and data quality.
Supplier selection creates a delay affecting Transport, especially around fuel use and emissions.
Transport creates a trade-off affecting Manufacturing, especially around energy use, scrap and lubricants.
Manufacturing creates a bottleneck affecting Quality control, especially around material substitution constraints.
Quality control creates a feedback loop affecting Customer use, especially around efficiency implications.
Customer use creates a risk transfer affecting End of life, especially around recovery potential.
Learning from Customer use should feed back into Supplier selection decisions before scaling.
Fibre production creates a dependency affecting Textile processing, especially around chemical, water and energy impacts.
Textile processing creates a delay affecting Garment manufacturing, especially around labour conditions and wages.
Garment manufacturing creates a trade-off affecting Buying and planning, especially around overproduction and supplier pressure.
Buying and planning creates a bottleneck affecting Transport, especially around air freight emissions.
Transport creates a feedback loop affecting Retail and returns, especially around packaging, unsold goods and returns.
Retail and returns creates a risk transfer affecting Use and end of life, especially around durability and poor recycling.
Learning from Retail and returns should feed back into Textile processing decisions before scaling.
Product design creates a dependency affecting Customer assessment, especially around fairness and evidence burden.
Customer assessment creates a delay affecting Credit decision, especially around financed emissions and risk.
Credit decision creates a trade-off affecting Loan conditions, especially around transition support quality.
Loan conditions creates a bottleneck affecting Monitoring, especially around data quality and accountability.
Monitoring creates a feedback loop affecting Renewal, especially around opportunity to improve terms.
Renewal creates a risk transfer affecting Reporting, especially around investor and regulatory scrutiny.
Learning from Renewal should feed back into Customer assessment decisions before scaling.
Procurement creates a dependency affecting Patient travel, especially around transport emissions and equity.
Patient travel creates a delay affecting Clinical treatment, especially around high climate impact and safety constraints.
Clinical treatment creates a trade-off affecting Facilities, especially around energy and water impacts.
Facilities creates a bottleneck affecting Waste, especially around hazardous waste.
Waste creates a feedback loop affecting Community services, especially around travel and access trade-offs.
Community services creates a risk transfer affecting Supplier management, especially around upstream evidence quality.
Learning from Community services should feed back into Patient travel decisions before scaling.
Farming creates a dependency affecting Aggregation, especially around loss of traceability.
Aggregation creates a delay affecting Processing, especially around energy, water and food loss.
Processing creates a trade-off affecting Packaging, especially around plastic and board impacts.
Packaging creates a bottleneck affecting Distribution, especially around refrigeration and transport.
Distribution creates a feedback loop affecting Retail, especially around waste and buyer influence.
Retail creates a risk transfer affecting Consumption, especially around nutrition and food waste.
Learning from Retail should feed back into Aggregation decisions before scaling.
Site acquisition creates a dependency affecting Concept design, especially around highest decision leverage.
Concept design creates a delay affecting Planning, especially around community and regulatory approval.
Planning creates a trade-off affecting Detailed design, especially around embodied and operational carbon.
Detailed design creates a bottleneck affecting Procurement, especially around specification delivery.
Procurement creates a feedback loop affecting Construction, especially around waste, transport and safety.
Construction creates a risk transfer affecting Use, especially around energy, water and wellbeing.
Use creates a reinforcing loop affecting End of life, especially around reuse and waste.
Learning from Use should feed back into Concept design decisions before scaling.
Product design creates a dependency affecting Cloud procurement, especially around energy and water dependency.
Cloud procurement creates a delay affecting Development, especially around hardware and testing impacts.
Development creates a trade-off affecting Deployment, especially around ongoing compute demand.
Deployment creates a bottleneck affecting Customer use, especially around customer resource use.
Customer use creates a feedback loop affecting Employee work, especially around travel and home energy.
Employee work creates a risk transfer affecting End of life, especially around e-waste and storage.
Learning from Employee work should feed back into Cloud procurement decisions before scaling.
Product acquisition creates a dependency affecting Inspection, especially around product rejection.
Inspection creates a delay affecting Repair, especially around labour, energy and parts.
Repair creates a trade-off affecting Delivery, especially around transport emissions.
Delivery creates a bottleneck affecting Customer use, especially around appliance efficiency and behaviour.
Customer use creates a feedback loop affecting Return, especially around transport and replacement impacts.
Return creates a risk transfer affecting End of life, especially around recycling and disposal.
Learning from Return should feed back into Inspection decisions before scaling.
Network planning creates a dependency affecting Vehicle procurement, especially around lifecycle impact.
Vehicle procurement creates a delay affecting Infrastructure, especially around embodied carbon and readiness.
Infrastructure creates a trade-off affecting Operations, especially around direct emissions and reliability.
Operations creates a bottleneck affecting Passenger use, especially around public value and emissions.
Passenger use creates a feedback loop affecting Maintenance, especially around capability constraint.
Maintenance creates a risk transfer affecting End of life, especially around battery and vehicle disposal.
Learning from Maintenance should feed back into Vehicle procurement decisions before scaling.
Research creates a dependency affecting Clinical development, especially around materials and travel.
Clinical development creates a delay affecting Manufacturing, especially around water, solvents and waste.
Manufacturing creates a trade-off affecting Packaging, especially around safety and sterility trade-offs.
Packaging creates a bottleneck affecting Distribution, especially around cold-chain energy.
Distribution creates a feedback loop affecting Patient use, especially around access and disposal.
Patient use creates a risk transfer affecting End of life, especially around ecosystem exposure.
Learning from Patient use should feed back into Clinical development decisions before scaling.
